_publications._publicationTitle: Anti-cancer agent 3-bromopyruvate reduces growth of MPNST and inhibits metabolic pathways in a representative in-vitro model.

_contextSnippet: A variable, dose-dependent reduction of cell viability was observed...all correlations were significant (p ≤ 0.005)
details: Successfully measured dose-dependent viability changes in MPNST cell lines with significant correlations (p ≤ 0.005)
